title: [4.0-rhel] do not set the inheritable capabilities
body:
The kernel never sets the inheritable capabilities for a process, they
are only set by userspace. Emulate the same behavior.

Closes: CVE-2022-27649

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano [gscrivan@redhat.com](mailto:gscrivan@redhat.com)
(cherry picked from commit https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/aafa80918a245edcbdaceb1191d749570f1872d0)
